_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of computer networking fundamentals (i.e., basic computer components of a network, types of networks, etc.).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, firewall and security group configurations, load balancing, and how network architecture affects data pipeline design and performance.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.492), DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.476).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.1/10 (raw 0.709). Shared vocabulary: [fundamentals, knowledge, network, networking]. DCWF-only terms [basic, components, computer, etc, i, networks] vs WIDAI-only terms [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.899, R=0.859). P exceeds R by 0.040 — the DCWF element's 16 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 31 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of computer networking fundamentals (i.e., basic computer components o" and "Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.683 ≈ STS 0.709 (gap 0.027). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [fundamentals, knowledge, network, networking] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.8%. Shared tokens: [fundamentals, knowledge, network, networking]. DCWF-only: [basic, components, computer, etc, i, networks]. WIDAI-only: [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, design].
